title: Terra Firma
summary: This is my entry into the BlitzCoder Stupidest Game Competition, 2002. You need to guide a sky diver—whose parachute has failed—past obstacles and attempt to land on a cow. Fun! It was written using BlitzBasic and later recompiled in BlitzPlus. This is the game that made me realise I could make games. Archived web page: gingerbeardman.com/archive/terrafirma…
content:
This is my entry into the BlitzCoder Stupidest Game Competition, 2002. You need to guide a sky diver—whose parachute has failed—past obstacles and attempt to land on a cow. Fun!

It was written using BlitzBasic and later recompiled in BlitzPlus.

This is the game that made me realise I could make games.

Archived web page: gingerbeardman.com/archive/terrafirma/

Download: gingerbeardman.itch.io/terra-firma
